build.beforeBuildCommand: node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b tsconfig.json && node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config frontend/vite.config.ts

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
